params.name: Boy with Goose
params.source: Fragment Crafting (31.2%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.8%), Expert Scrolls (7.6%)
params.description:
On Nov 14, 299 BC, Greek sculptor Boethos created this sculpture.

It was a scene of a lovely child playing with a big goose. The image of the child is an interesting one. He wants to pull the goose back from walking forward but the goose keeps going against the child. The statue presents the child's actions and skin realistically, which shows the great craftsmanship of the artist.

[Basic Info]

Era: Ancient Greek

Height: 81cm

Material: Marble Collected by Glyptothek
